metadata.description: forge-harness — Multi-instance persona orchestration and meta-tooling marketplace for Claude Code. Harness engineering toolkit for teams that want to evolve their AI collaboration practices.

plugins.name: fh-meta
plugins.description: Hub meta-operations toolkit — 29 skills + 3 agents. New in 1.3.0: public-surface-audit (private-token leak scan), field-harvest Mode B auto-trigger, 4-axis gate scope ext (docs/ + AGENTS.md). New in 1.2.0: pipeline-conductor, return-path-gate, goal-quench, steel-quench Wave 5 (multi-model sidecar), YAML validation script, 2-layer architecture docs. Validated cross-CLI: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini.

plugins.name: fh-commons
plugins.description: Project-agnostic utility skills — 4 skills (convergence-loop · deliberation · mcp-circuit-breaker · token-budget-gate) + 1 agent (quench-challenger). Domain-independent utilities transplantable into any project.
